channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-8911] tests: sanity-hsm test_24d fails on a local setup (1 node)
item.description:
The test time out waiting for the second archive request to complete:

== sanity-hsm test 24d: check that read-only mounts are respected == 14:44:03 (1481035443)
Only wakeup running copytool agt1 on vm0
2+0 records in
2+0 records out
2097152 bytes (2.1 MB) copied, 0.215653 s, 9.7 MB/s
Cannot send HSM request (use of /mnt/lustre2/d24d.sanity-hsm/f24d.sanity-hsm): Read-only file system
Waiting 200 secs for update
Waiting 190 secs for update
Waiting 180 secs for update
Waiting 170 secs for update
Waiting 160 secs for update
Waiting 150 secs for update
Waiting 140 secs for update
Waiting 130 secs for update
Waiting 120 secs for update
Waiting 110 secs for update
Waiting 100 secs for update
Waiting 90 secs for update
Waiting 80 secs for update
Waiting 70 secs for update
Waiting 60 secs for update
Waiting 50 secs for update
Waiting 40 secs for update
Waiting 30 secs for update
Waiting 20 secs for update
Waiting 10 secs for update
Update not seen after 200s: wanted 'SUCCEED' got 'STARTED'
 sanity-hsm test_24d: @@@@@@ FAIL: request on 0x200000402:0x1:0x0 is not SUCCEED on mds1 
  Trace dump:
  = /home/bougetq/lustre-release/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:4841:error()
  = /home/bougetq/lustre-release/lustre/tests/sanity-hsm.sh:719:wait_request_state()
  = /home/bougetq/lustre-release/lustre/tests/sanity-hsm.sh:2161:test_24d()
  = /home/bougetq/lustre-release/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:5117:run_one()
  = /home/bougetq/lustre-release/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:5156:run_one_logged()
  = /home/bougetq/lustre-release/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:4955:run_test()
  = /home/bougetq/lustre-release/lustre/tests/sanity-hsm.sh:2176:main()
Dumping lctl log to /tmp/test_logs/2016-12-06/144342/sanity-hsm.test_24d.*.1481035645.log
Dumping logs only on local client.
Resetting fail_loc on all nodes...done.
FAIL 24d (202s)
item.summary: tests: sanity-hsm test_24d fails on a local setup (1 node)

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
Oleg Drokin (oleg.drokin@intel.com) merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/24185/
Subject: LU-8911 tests: sanity-hsm test_24d fails on a local setup
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: 35a3f955502c6406761cadc720283f8132665a43

Quentin Bouget (quentin.bouget@cea.fr) uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/24185
Subject: LU-8911 tests: sanity-hsm test_24d fails on a local setup
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 27af2f573f7f9a2261f220d68bc52d50ec237c37
This seems to be due to the fact copytools are started by default on MOUNT2 which on a single node setup conflicts with the read-only mount.
